channel.title: Workflow on cekrem.github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Workflow on cekrem.github.io

item.title: If You're Running Claude Code, PLEASE Run It in a Box
item.description:
Let’s talk about Claude Code for a minute. I’m not going to tell you yet again ([1], [2], [3], [4]) why you shouldn’t, but rather how you should use it, if you must. In other words: this post assumes you’ve already thought about the craft side, and focuses on not blowing up your production database in the process.

But just to summarize the why and why not of Claude Code (or whatever latest fancy tool), here’s where I actually think it shines:
